name: Uvigerina spp. Stable Isotope Data from Gulf of Mexico Sediment Core M78/1_181-3
description: A dataset containing sediment depth, age, and stable isotope ratios (δ13C and δ18O) of the benthic foraminifera Uvigerina spp. from a sediment core collected at coordinates 29.0°N, 88.33°W in the Gulf of Mexico. The data includes 219 samples with associated event identifiers, elevation, and collection timestamps, supporting paleoceanographic and paleoclimatic reconstructions.
